post.content:
Hey there, Leetcode community! I've noticed a shortage of shared interview experiences for Data Engineering roles, so I'm contributing my bit. 

Current Company - Famous Unicorn startup 
YOE - 2.8 

Google - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5147609/Google-L4-or-Application-Engineer-(-Data)-or-Hyderabad-or-April-2024-Rejected
Microsoft - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5147799/Microsoft-or-Data-Engineer-or-Senior-Software-Engineer-or-Hyderabad-or-Jan-2024
Uber - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5147739/Uber-L4-or-SDE-2-Data-Engineer-or-Hyderabad-or-April-2024
Flipkart - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5147858/Flipkart-or-Data-Engineer-II-or-Bangalore-or-Offer
Quince - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5147884/Quince-or-SDE-2-or-Data-Engineer-or-Bangalore-or-Offer
MoEngage - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5147904/MoEngage-or-SDE-2-or-Data-Engineer-or-Bangalore-or-Offer
Hotstar - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5147927/Hotstar-or-SDE-2-or-Data-Engineer-or-April-2024-or-Rejected
VISA - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5148036/VISA-or-Senior-Data-Engineer-or-Bangalore-or-Rejected
Walmart - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5148102/Walmart-or-Data-Engineer-III-or-Bangalore-or-Rejected
DeShaw - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/5148124/De-Shaw-or-SDE-II-or-Data-Engineer-or-Bangalore-or-Rejected
Meesho - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/5150342/Meesho-or-SDE-2-or-Data-Engineer-or-Bangalore-or-Reject

Apart from above few more interviews i have given are at Tekion Corp, CoinDcx and JPMC UK.

Compensation - https://leetcode.com/discuss/compensation/5157810/SDE-2-or-Data-Engineer-or-Quince-or-Flipkart-or-MoEngage
